name: Dishwasher Rack Wheel
description: Replacement wheel for the lower dishwasher rack.
review_snippets: Perfect replacement and very easy to install.
Fixed my lower rack issue in minutes.

name: Dishwasher Drain Pump
description: Pumps water out of the dishwasher during the drain cycle.
review_snippets: Solved my draining problem right away.

name: Dishwasher Spray Arm
description: Rotating spray arm that distributes water during the wash cycle.
review_snippets: Water coverage improved a lot after replacing this.
Fit perfectly and restored cleaning performance.

name: Dishwasher Door Latch
description: Secures the dishwasher door and ensures proper sealing.

name: Dishwasher Heating Element
description: Heats water during wash cycles and assists with drying.
review_snippets: Dishes are finally drying properly again.

name: Dishwasher Float Switch
description: Detects water level inside the dishwasher.
review_snippets: Small part but made a big difference.

name: Dishwasher Water Inlet Valve
description: Controls water flow into the dishwasher.

name: Dishwasher Control Board
description: Electronic control board that manages dishwasher cycles.
review_snippets: A bit pricier but solved the issue.

name: Dishwasher Filter Assembly
description: Filters food particles from the wash water.
review_snippets: Helped with draining and cleaning performance.
Easy to swap out and clean.

name: Dishwasher Door Seal
description: Rubber gasket that prevents water leaks around the door.
review_snippets: Good seal and easy to fit.

name: Refrigerator Ice Maker Assembly
description: Produces ice automatically in the freezer compartment.
review_snippets: Excellent fit and clear installation process.

name: Refrigerator Water Inlet Valve
description: Controls water supply to ice maker and dispenser.
review_snippets: Fixed both dispenser and ice maker issues.

name: Refrigerator Evaporator Fan Motor
description: Circulates cold air throughout the refrigerator.

name: Refrigerator Defrost Thermostat
description: Prevents overheating during defrost cycle.

name: Refrigerator Door Gasket
description: Seals the refrigerator door to keep cold air inside.
review_snippets: Seal was perfect and reduced temperature swings.
Easy to install and high quality.

name: Refrigerator Condenser Fan Motor
description: Cools the condenser coils by circulating air.

name: Refrigerator Temperature Control Thermostat
description: Controls refrigerator cooling cycles.

name: Refrigerator Air Damper Control
description: Regulates airflow between freezer and refrigerator compartments.
review_snippets: Solved warm fridge / cold freezer issue.

name: Refrigerator Defrost Heater
description: Melts frost buildup on evaporator coils.

name: Refrigerator Door Switch
description: Turns interior light on/off when door opens or closes.
